description: Equality on unique clustered B+ key -> A2: h+1=4, 1 row
query: SELECT Student.indeks FROM Student WHERE Student.indeks = S123

description: Range on non-clustered attr -> full scan cheaper than A6
query: SELECT Student.prosek FROM Student WHERE Student.prosek > 8.5

description: No WHERE -> full scan of table
Two table join -> plan root is Projection wrapping a Join
query: SELECT Student.indeks, Ispit.ocena FROM Student, Ispit WHERE Student.indeks = Ispit.studentIndeks

description: Join with selection pushed down to Student
query: SELECT Student.indeks, Ispit.ocena FROM Student, Ispit WHERE Student.indeks = Ispit.studentIndeks AND Student.prosek > 8.5

description: ORDER BY -> root must be SortNode
query: SELECT Student.indeks FROM Student, Ispit WHERE Student.indeks = Ispit.studentIndeks ORDER BY Student.indeks

description: Three table join -> two JoinNodes in tree
query: SELECT Student.indeks, Predmet.naziv FROM Student, Ispit, Predmet WHERE Student.indeks = Ispit.studentIndeks AND Ispit.predmetId = Predmet.predmetId

description: SELECT * expands to all attributes of the queried table
Equality on hash-indexed attr -> hash index used (cost=2)
query: SELECT Student.ime FROM Student WHERE Student.ime = Ana
